title: UCMS Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 59 Senior Demonstrator, Senior Resident Posts
description: The University College of Medical Sciences (UCMS) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 59 Senior Resident and Senior Demonstrator Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MBBS, Post-graduation, Diploma, MDS, and M.Sc. can apply for the UCMS Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode.
